---
title: "AgentOS CLI"
---

<!-- generated by tooling/agentos-cli/src/generate/project-docs-site.mjs; edit docs/packages/agentos-cli.md -->

## Purpose

`@agent-os/agentos-cli` is the repo-local command entrypoint for generated
projections, authored agent builds, and boundary rule checks.

## Invariant

The CLI consumes source facts and runs owner gates. It does not own package
facts, public API intent, carrier declarations, or substrate runtime behavior.

## Minimal Usage

```sh
bun run agentos -- check all
bun run agentos -- check guard public-api
bun run agentos -- build --cwd /path/to/app
bun run agentos -- generate docs
```

## Verification

```sh
bun run agentos -- --help
bun run agentos -- check guard ag-ui-sse-axis
```
